description: Reflect damage equal to a percentage of this unit's armor back to the attacker on each hit.
tooltipTemplate: Reflect damage equal to {armorPercent%} of your armor back to each attacker on every hit.

description: Attacks have a chance to taunt the target, forcing it to focus on this Vanguard briefly.
tooltipTemplate: {tauntChance%} chance on each attack to taunt the target for {tauntDurationSeconds:1}s, forcing it to focus on you.

description: Reduce incoming damage by a flat amount per hit.
tooltipTemplate: Reduce all incoming damage by {flatReduction} per hit (applied after armor).

description: Attacks have a chance to stun the target briefly, then slow them for a short time afterward.
tooltipTemplate: {procChance%} chance on hit to stun for {stunSeconds:1}s, then slow to {slowMultiplier%} of their speed for {slowSeconds:1}s.

description: Gain bonus armor while standing near any allied unit.
tooltipTemplate: Gain +{bonusArmor} armor while any ally is within {radius} units.
